data-collection-services.h2: From Data Requirement to Delivered Dataset in 5 Steps

steps.title: Define Requirements
steps.desc: You tell us what data you need: sources, fields, format, frequency, and delivery method. We ask the right questions to scope the project accurately.

steps.title: Source Assessment
steps.desc: Our team assesses the target sources, identifies technical challenges (anti-bot measures, authentication, data structure), and confirms feasibility.

steps.title: Build and Configure
steps.desc: We build the extraction pipeline, configure validation rules, and run an initial test batch for your review before full-scale collection begins.

steps.title: Collect and Validate
steps.desc: Full collection runs with multi-stage validation: deduplication, format standardisation, accuracy checks, and removal of incomplete records.

steps.title: Deliver and Review
steps.desc: Datasets are delivered in your preferred format and frequency. You receive a delivery report, and we address any quality queries within 24 hours.

data-management-services.h2: From Fragmented Data to a Single Source of Truth

steps.title: Data Audit
steps.desc: We assess your current data state: sources, volumes, formats, quality issues, and integration requirements. You get a clear picture of what needs fixing and in what order.

steps.title: Scope and Rules
steps.desc: We agree on quality standards, validation rules, field requirements, output formats, and delivery method. Everything is documented before work begins.

steps.title: Initial Clean and Enrich
steps.desc: First pass: deduplication, standardisation, and enrichment on your existing data. You receive a sample for review before full-scale processing.

steps.title: Full Processing and Delivery
steps.desc: Full dataset processed, validated, and delivered in your preferred format. A quality report accompanies every delivery showing accuracy rates and changes made.

steps.title: Ongoing Management
steps.desc: Scheduled refresh cycles, continuous validation monitoring, and regular reporting keep your data current. You set the cadence, we maintain the quality.
